# Migration Plugin

PF version migration — breaking change detection, class scanning, upgrade planning.

## What's Included

### Skills

- **PF Class Migration Scanner** (`/migration:pf-class-migration-scanner`) — Scan code for legacy PatternFly CSS classes and recommend PF6-safe replacements.

## Sources

- [PatternFly.org](https://www.patternfly.org/)
- [PatternFly Migration Guide](https://www.patternfly.org/get-started/upgrade)
